use std::slice;

const MAX_SLICE_LEN: usize = 1 << 20;

unsafe fn make_slice_from_ffi(ptr: *const u8, len: usize) -> &'static [u8] {
    assert!(!ptr.is_null(), "null pointer from FFI");
    assert!(len <= MAX_SLICE_LEN, "slice length exceeds maximum");
    assert_eq!(ptr as usize % std::mem::align_of::<u8>(), 0);
    slice::from_raw_parts(ptr, len)
}

unsafe fn wrap_buffer_checked(ptr: *mut u8, count: usize) -> Option<Vec<u8>> {
    if ptr.is_null() || count > MAX_SLICE_LEN {
        return None;
    }
    let s = slice::from_raw_parts_mut(ptr, count);
    Some(s.to_vec())
}
